creator: arnaud@pnzone.net
text:
Created attachment 175318
Patch to fix the compilation of Duplicity when configuration flag GDOCS is set to on

Attached patch fixes the compilation of Duplicity when configuration flag GDOCS is set to on.
This fix just removes the dependency to py-gdata.

py-gdata is marked is BROKEN ("Unfetchable (google code has gone away)")
py-gdata is indeed obsolete, unusable, unmaintained and removed from google repository.
py-gdata as a duplicity Google Drive backend has been replaced by pydrive.

pydrive is not part of the FreeBSD port tree but can be installed via py-pip (pip install PyDrive).
